title: Approval Gated Handoff Envelope
description: Machine-readable transition metadata for the optional approval-gated orchestration overlay.

currentAgent.description: The agent producing the current handoff.

recommendedNextAgent.description: The next specialist recommended by the overlay transition.

scopeSummary.description: Short description of the work being handed off.

reasonForHandoff.description: Why the next specialist is the right transition target.

approvalRequired.description: Whether the transition requires an explicit approval checkpoint.

approvalStatus.description: Workflow metadata for the current approval state.

approverIdentity.description: Optional workflow identity for who approved the transition. Informational only unless a future enforcement layer is added.

approvalTimestamp.description: Optional approval timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

transitionStatus.description: Current state of the proposed transition.

auditReference.description: Optional reference to an audit entry or tracking identifier.

inputsForNextAgent.description: Optional list of files, artifacts, or evidence the next agent should consume.

decisionStatus.description: Core handoff readiness status carried into the overlay envelope when needed.
